violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of waffle mix and syrup were located in the middle of the prep area floor, and had been there at least 48 hours.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. White fridge in the food prep area was not maintained at an adequate temperature of 41 degrees or less. Food inside was temping at 60 degrees.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The juice dispenser and the coffee maker needs to be cleaned. Evidence of mold in the juice dispenser.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelving in the breakfast area needs to be cleaned. The refrigerator in the food prep area needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser in the back prep area was non-functioning at time of inspection.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling the prep area not designed for ease of cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Cleaning chemicals stored next to ready to eat food items, and above dishes in the prep area.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. Drain flys present in the customer service cupboard under the sink.
